opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is pounding relentlessly, the room is spinning, and my vision keeps blurring in and out. My face feels like it is on fire.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly a few hours ago and it will not settle — the painkillers I took did nothing, I can't stand up without the room spinning, and I'm on my own tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: the severe headache, dizziness and blurred vision came on over the past 4 hours; the tiredness and the itching have been building for about 6 months
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours for the head and vision, worsening
symptom_narrative.character: a relentless pounding headache, the room spinning, vision blurring in and out, ringing in the ears, and a face that feels like it is on fire
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst headache I can remember — I can't get up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: head and eyes, ringing in both ears, a full heavy feeling in the upper left side of my belly, and burning hot hands
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant for the last few hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — lying flat in a dark cool room helps a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: ringing in the ears, my vision went blurry for about 15 minutes then came back, my face and eyes are very red, my palms and soles burn and go bright red, and I get unbearable itching for up to an hour after a warm shower
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no episode this bad before, but I have felt worn out and short of puff for months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying flat in a dark room, cannot stand because of the dizziness and headache

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one 400 mg tablet taken a few hours ago for the headache

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else is at home tonight

objective_data_offered.value: 165/95 on my home blood pressure monitor
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff while unwell and distressed

objective_data_offered.value: face is markedly flushed and bright red (ruddy); the whites of both eyes look very bloodshot
both palms look bright red and the patient says they are burning hot
vision blurred in and out for about 15 minutes then came back
